arts.ttl: Milan dash Inter's treble dreams in Coppa semis
arts.sum: AC Milan ruined Inter's bid for a treble and advanced to the Coppa Italia final with a 3-0 derby win Wednesday courtesy of two goals from Luka Jovic.

arts.ttl: European football: Milan blow away Inter to reach Coppa Italia final
arts.sum: Jovic double gives Milan 3-0 win over rivals Real keep their title hopes alive with victory Milan ruined Inter’s push for a treble and advanced to the Coppa Italia final with a 3-0 derby win courtesy of two goals from Luka Jovic. Inter pressed forward early on and Federico Dimarco struck the crossbar in the 23rd minute. But Jovic put Milan ahead 13 minutes later with a powerful header and then doubled the advantage from close range shortly after the break. Tijjani Reijnders added another for Milan in the 85th minute by finishing off an excellent team move, giving them a 4-1 aggregate triumph over two legs. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Inter Player Ratings vs Milan: Nerazzurri’s Treble Dream Ends in Coppa Italia Humbling
arts.sum: The two sides had settled for a 1-1 draw in the first leg, but Sergio Conceicao's men were far more clinical in the decisive second contest, prevailing by three unanswered goals. So here are our player ratings for Inter, whose Treble dream came crashing down following a heavy defeat at the hands of Milan.
